must_detect.matched_text: Affected business: Corporate Development workspace held a draft term sheet for a proposed acquisition of MidoriGrid KK; contents are undisclosed material facts under FIEA and remain on a need-to-know basis.

Market conduct: A company-wide blackout window remains in effect until kessan release; tipping or selective disclosure regarding the contemplated acquisition or ESG targets is strictly prohibited; all media inquiries must be routed to IR.

Affected business: Corporate Development workspace held a draft term sheet for a proposed acquisition of MidoriGrid KK; contents are undisclosed material facts under FIEA and remain on a need-to-know basis.
Digital assets: Keys for our sandbox “Shirocoin” employee token wallet (test environment only) were stored in a subfolder; keys have been rotated and no on-chain movement was identified, but credential replay risk remains.
ESG materials: Draft Scope 1–3 emissions recalculation and climate-risk narrative for FY2026, as well as unannounced science-based emissions targets and a provisional sustainability-linked loan covenant table, were accessed; this information is non-public.
Containment: Vendor VPN disabled, IAM tokens revoked, and forensic images captured; trade surveillance has been notified to enforce information barriers with the proprietary trading desk of our subsidiary Koma Capital GK.
Governance: Insider list opened for Incident IR-24-061, including Ms. Hanae Kuroda (CISO), Mr. Daichi Morimoto (CorpDev), and two board observers; entries will be maintained in accordance with internal FIEA procedures.
Market conduct: A company-wide blackout window remains in effect until kessan release; tipping or selective disclosure regarding the contemplated acquisition or ESG targets is strictly prohibited; all media inquiries must be routed to IR.
Commercial terms risk: The leaked term sheet included preliminary valuation ranges, earn-out mechanics, and regulator-clearance milestones; all terms are subject to board approval and may change materially.
Third parties: No customer personal data or production OT networks were affected; operations at the Nagisaka Plant continue without disruption.
Education: Next week’s lunch-and-learn on information barriers and insider lists will use generic case studies and will not include MNPI or crypto wallet credentials.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
